title: Get in touch!
text:
✉️ goncaloafmatos[at]tecnico.pt





Beyond academia
In my leasure time I like to cycle, read, take photographs and get involved with the community. If you share any of these hobbies, feel free to connect with me using the links below!

title: Gonçalo F. Matos
text:
Hi, I’m Gonçalo!
I am a programmer who is interested in writing (not only code), mobility and equality.
I have a master’s degree in Transportation Systems at Instituto Superior Técnico (University of Lisbon), where I continue to explore the transportation world, assisting U-Shift urban mobility lab on their research projects.


💻🛤️🌍
